name: Phase 1: Post-implementation review
description: After an agent execution completes on Phase 1 files, verify the changes are consistent with all specs and steering rules.

action.message:
An agent execution just completed on Phase 1 files. Please do a quick consistency check on any files that were modified:

1. If deepracer_tools.py was changed: confirm all @tool decorators are present and stop_car() is still in a finally block.
2. If agent.py was changed: confirm tools=[] in create_planner() and PLANNER_PROMPT is still a module-level constant.
3. If app_ui.py was changed: confirm debug=False and the planner singleton pattern is intact.
4. If main.py was changed: confirm the confirmation gate still requires 'y'/'yes' explicitly.
5. If templates/index.html was changed: confirm the Execute button is still guarded by currentPlan check.
6. If any .env or .env.example was changed: confirm no real credentials were introduced.

Only report items that actually changed. If nothing relevant changed, say so briefly.
